title: Derivative Asset
description: A machine-readable registration record for an asset derived from one or more origin assets in the Origin Structure Market.

id.description: A unique identifier for the derivative asset.

title.description: Human-readable title of the derivative asset.

creator.description: Identifier, handle, name, or DID of the derivative creator.

description.description: Short explanation of the derivative asset and how it transforms upstream origin assets.

timestamp.description: Registration timestamp of the derivative asset.

version.description: Version of this derivative asset record.

derived_from.description: Upstream origin assets or derivative assets that contributed to this asset.

asset_id.description: Identifier of the upstream origin or derivative asset.

asset_role.description: Role of the upstream asset in this derivative.

title.description: Optional human-readable title of the upstream asset.

contribution_claim.description: Claimed contribution weight of the upstream asset to this derivative.

transformation_type.description: Types of transformation applied from the upstream asset.

evidence.description: Optional evidence supporting the derivation claim.

shared_concepts.description: Shared concepts between upstream and derivative assets.

shared_structure.description: Shared structural patterns between upstream and derivative assets.

evidence_hashes.description: Hashes of supporting evidence, drafts, commits, or archived records.

output.description: Output characteristics of the derivative asset.

asset_type.description: Output asset type produced by the derivative.

commercial_use.description: Whether the derivative asset is intended for commercial use.

distribution_channel.description: Primary distribution channel for the derivative asset.

canonical_hash.description: Hash of the canonical expression of the derivative asset.

proposed_royalty_split.description: Proposed royalty allocation for revenue generated by this derivative asset.

final_creator.description: Suggested share for the final product creator.

origin_creator.description: Suggested share for upstream origin creators.

auditor.description: Suggested share for origin auditors or evaluators.

protocol_fund.description: Suggested share for protocol maintenance or commons funding.

notes.description: Optional notes on the proposed royalty split.

trace.description: Trace links and references supporting the derivative record.

source_url.description: Primary URL or repository location of the derivative asset.

gpt_url.description: Optional GPT or agent URL related to the derivative asset.

related_assets.description: Related assets, protocols, repositories, or standards.

human_review.description: Optional human review boundary for the derivative registration.

required.description: Whether human review is required before accepting the derivative claim.

status.description: Review status of the derivative registration.
